headline: Buffett Backs Greg Abel As Berkshire Valuation And Earnings Outlook Diverge
summary: Warren Buffett publicly rated incoming CEO Greg Abel a "perfect 10" on alignment with Berkshire Hathaway shareholders. The comments followed Berkshire's first major leadership transition since 1965, signaling confidence in the new era. Abel has been reinvesting personal capital into Berkshire Hathaway stock, underlining his stake in NYSE:BRK.A alongside other shareholders. Berkshire Hathaway, trading as NYSE:BRK.A, is entering this leadership shift with a long operating history and a...

headline: Berkshire Hathaway Enters Greg Abel Era With Cash And Valuation In Focus
summary: Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE:BRK.B) is now led by CEO Greg Abel, following the transition from Warren Buffett. The company held its first annual shareholder meeting without Buffett as CEO, marking a historic change in leadership. Under Abel, Berkshire has been allocating more capital to Japanese trading houses and has resumed share buybacks. The group has reported strong operational performance in Q1, alongside refinements in its investment approach. Berkshire Hathaway, the diversified holding...
